examples: His colleagues worked out his interesting idea
We worked up an ad for our client

meanings.definition: happen in a certain way, leading to, producing, or resulting in a certain outcome, often well
examples: Things worked out in an interesting way
Not everything worked out in the end and we were disappointed
She works out in the gym every day
The fees work out to less than $1,000

meanings.definition: make a mathematical calculation or computation
find the solution to (a problem or question) or understand the meaning of
examples: Work out your problems with the boss
this unpleasant situation isn't going to work itself out
He could not work the math problem
My personal trainer works me hard
this puzzle will exercise your mind
